name: WLF_GEN_AI_RESOURCES
description: This table stores the details of the resources used to generate summary using Gen AI.

columns.Name: GEN_AI_RESOURCE_ID
columns.Comments: System generated unique identifier.

columns.Name: OBJECT_ID
columns.Comments: Reference to the identifier of the resource object.

columns.Name: FAMILY
columns.Comments: Specifies the product family associated with the resource.

columns.Name: INPUT_SOURCE
columns.Comments: Specifies the input source for the object (e.g., Business Object, Email Account, etc.,)

columns.Name: OBJECT_TYPE
columns.Comments: Specifies the resource object type (e.g., Learning Item, Job Profile, etc.,)

columns.Name: OBJECT_DETAILS
columns.Comments: Specifies the details of the source object.

columns.Name: LATEST_PROCESSING_STATUS
columns.Comments: Specifies the latest object processing status.

columns.Name: LATEST_RAG_PUBLISH_DATE
columns.Comments: Specifies the timestamp when the object summary is published to RAG.

columns.Name: GEN_AI_USE_CASE_ID
columns.Comments: Specifies the use case used to generate summary using Gen AI.

columns.Name: GEN_AI_PROMPT
columns.Comments: Specifies the prompt used to generate summary using Gen AI.

columns.Name: GEN_AI_SUMMARY
columns.Comments: Specifies the summary generated by Gen AI.

columns.Name: SLDS_OBJECT
columns.Comments: Represents SLDS object for a given Gen AI resource

columns.Name: OBJECT_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Represents synthetic Object logical key

columns.Name: CURATED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Specifies if the sythetic object data is curated or not

columns.Name: ESS_JOB_ID
columns.Comments: Specifies the enterprise scheduler job id that processed the resource.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
